name: Rising Sun Bancorp
summary: Rising Sun Bancorp operates as a holding company for NBRS Financial Bank that provides various banking services to individual and business customers. Its deposit products include checking, savings, e-checking, money market, certificates of deposit, individual retirement, and NOW accounts. The company loan portfolio comprises residential mortgage loans, residential construction loans, home equity line of credit, home equity loans, and secured installment and personal unsecured loans, as well as business loans. In addition, it offers online banking, online mobile pay, mobile banking, merchant cards, remote deposit capture, and other business services, as well as ATM cards. The company was founded in 1873 and is based in Rising Sun, Maryland.
